metadata.title:
BALLOT ON


CHARTER REVISION


COMMITTEE TONIGHT

pages.raw_text:
Tickets are being printed today
for the list of members of the com
mission to revise the city charter,
agreed upon at the meeting of the
revisionists yesterday. This list
will be balloted upon tonight at the
public meeting to be held by the
charter revisionists in the Elks'
temple. 1t Is expected that suf-
ficient numbers OF supporters of the
commission plan will be in attend
ance to see that the slate selected
by the committee Is approved by
the mass meeting


Judge Adolph Munter has been
selected to preside at the meeting
and DR.. r. A. Munro will act as sec
retary.


1t is desired that all friends of a
commission plan of government
turn out to the meeting and see that
good men are elected on the official
committee Of Is to draft the new
charter.


The work of this committee will
be submitted to the people without
